heading: Bureaus: names; location
label: 8071 Bureaus: names; location
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5131(less applicability to distribution of business among bureaus).5 U.S.C. 429R.S. 419 (less applicability to distribution of business among bureaus); , (6th par.); , (4th par.); (1st 17 words of 1st par.), ; , (b), ; , .July 19, 1892, ch. 20627 Stat. 243June 30, 1914, ch. 13038 Stat. 408July 12, 1921, ch. 44, § 842 Stat. 140June 20, 1940, ch. 400, § 1(a)54 Stat. 492May 13, 1942, ch. 303, § 156 Stat. 276The bureaus are listed alphabetically for convenience. This listing has no effect on the precedence of the bureaus.

Prior ProvisionsA prior section 8071, , , provided for appointment of a female Air Force officer in temporary grade of colonel, prior to repeal by , , .act Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 104170A Stat. 495Pub. L. 90–130, § 1(25)81 Stat. 382Nov. 8, 1967

Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 5131 of this title1966— struck out cls. (3) to (6) which related to the Bureau of Naval Weapons, the Bureau of Ships, the Bureau of Supplies and Accounts, and the Bureau of Yards and Docks, respectively.Pub. L. 89–7181959— inserted reference to Bureau of Naval Weapons and struck out reference to Bureau of Aeronautics and Bureau of Ordnance.Pub. L. 86–174

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019

Effective Date of 1959 Amendment, , , provided that the amendment of this section and former and the repeal of sections 5136 and 5144 of this title shall be effective on , or on any earlier date on which the Secretary of the Navy makes a formal finding that all the functions of the Bureau of Aeronautics and the Bureau of Ordnance have been transferred to the Bureau of Naval Weapons or elsewhere.Pub. L. 86–174, § 273 Stat. 395section 5133 of this titleAug. 18, 1959July 1, 1960

Bureau of Naval Weapons; Transfer of Funds, , , provided that:Pub. L. 86–174, § 373 Stat. 396Aug. 18, 1959“The unexpended balances of appropriations and funds available for use in connection with the exercise of any function transferred to the Bureau of Naval Weapons shall be transferred in the manner provided by section 407 of the National Security Act of 1947, as amended () [], for use in connection with the transferred functions.”5 U.S.C. 172f10 U.S.C. 126
